creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
On Thu, 21 Sep 2000 merlingermany@t-online.de wrote:

> >Synopsis:       cdrecord can't find my recorder TEAC CDR-55S on SCSI id 0:4:0
> 
> >Description:
> cdrecord tool can't find my recorder TEAC CDR-55S on SCSI-ID 0:4:0.
> 

Do you have enough /dev/pass* devices made?  From your dmesg output, you
need at least pass0 - pass4 .  Try 'cd /dev && ./MAKEDEV pass5' to make
the 5 devices.

-----
Chris D. Faulhaber - jedgar@fxp.org - jedgar@FreeBSD.org
